currentTask.context: Game 45: Rattlesnake Round-Up - tests passing, committing

gameQueue.title: Rattlesnake Round-Up
gameQueue.concept: Herpetologist wrangling: a pit of rattlesnakes with individual heat signatures visible through a thermal scope. Tap to pin a snake, then drag to bag it before it escapes. Each round adds more snakes, faster escapes, and species that require two-handed pinning (hold then drag). First multi-phase interaction (pin + drag) in series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First multi-phase tap+drag interaction per entity, first thermal/heat-map visual layer, first timer-per-entity mechanic (each snake's pin fades)

gameQueue.title: Prairie Telegraph
gameQueue.concept: Semaphore signal relay: a chain of frontier outposts stretches across the plains. Decode incoming flag signals (arm positions = letters) and relay the message to the next station before the signal chain breaks. Each round adds more stations, faster signals, and interference (wind gusts that scramble flag positions). First semaphore/visual-signal decoding mechanic in series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First visual-symbol decoding game (semaphore vs Morse code audio in Wire Tap), first relay-chain game structure, first wind-interference mechanic on signal fidelity

gameQueue.title: Outlaw Auction
gameQueue.concept: Bounty hunter bidding war: auctions for captured outlaws on a frontier circuit. Each outlaw has a secret bounty value revealed only after purchase. Read behavioral tells from rival bidders to estimate true value - eager bidders signal high value, patient ones signal low. Bluff, fold, or overbid. First hidden-value auction with behavioral AI in series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First hidden-information economic game (vs Cattle Auction which had known grades), first behavioral-tell reading mechanic on economic decisions, first bidding game where rivals reveal information through their bidding patterns

runLog.summary: Fixed Midnight Rodeo: added touchstart handler; devices that do not fire pointerdown for touch now respond. 38 tests pass.
Fixed Last Rope Standing: directional kick mechanic (KICK_FORCE=500) gives players speed to reach higher platforms. 55 tests pass.
Fixed Midnight Rodeo: iOS position:fixed viewport, load-event resize, document-level touch fallback, guard condition fix. 39 tests pass.
Built Game 43: Wanted: Reward - visual search + composite matching, 4-trait crowd silhouettes, economic payout, 35 tests pass.
Built Game 33: Cattle Auction - economic bidding simulation, 6-buyer behavioral AI, going-once call mechanic, heat-bar urgency, 8 lots, 75 tests pass.
Built Game 34: Dust Devil Dance - generative music sandbox, draw paths for dust devils, pentatonic oscillators, landmark audio effects, resonance meter, 25 tests pass.
Built Game 35: Snake Canyon - first-person procedural maze, DFS canyon generation, audio-spatial rattlesnake, footstep timing mechanic, 26 tests pass.
Built Game 36: Rodeo Queen - skill-chain combo, 3 distinct events, 5x multiplier, 37 tests pass.
Built Game 37: Tumbledown Town - Verlet physics demolition puzzle, diagonal brace coupling, 5 levels, 50 tests pass.
Built Game 38: Dust Road Derby - top-down oval racer, parametric track, rubber-band AI rivals, slipstream draft mechanic, 50 tests pass.
Built Game 39: Last Rope Standing - pendulum grapple survival, constraint physics, rising floodwaters, 50 tests pass.
Built Game 40: Wire Tap - telegraph Morse code decoder, dot/dash audio classification, 3-round map identification, 51 tests pass.
Built Game 41: Gold Panner - particle physics pan-tilt, density stratification, claim jumper, 22 tests pass.
Built Game 42: Coyote Call - real-time pitch matching, oscilloscope dual-waveform, coyote howl synthesis, trust/scare dual meter, 26 tests pass.
Fixed Midnight Rodeo: added roundRect polyfill (missing in Chrome <99/Safari <15.4) and touch-action:none on canvas. 36 tests pass.
Fixed Midnight Rodeo: added touchstart handler; devices that do not fire pointerdown for touch now respond. 38 tests pass.
Fixed Last Rope Standing: directional kick mechanic (KICK_FORCE=500) gives players speed to reach higher platforms. 55 tests pass.
Fixed Midnight Rodeo: iOS position:fixed viewport, load-event resize, document-level touch fallback, guard condition fix. 39 tests pass.
Built Game 43: Wanted: Reward - visual search + composite matching, 4-trait crowd silhouettes, economic payout, 35 tests pass.
Built Game 44: Trail Blaze - player-drawn pathfinding, 5 terrain types, A* comparison, escalating threats, 35 tests pass.
